title: 看病买药
titleTranslation_ru: Визит к врачу и покупка лекарств
description_uz: «Shamollab qoldim, boshim og'riyapti, tomog'im ham og'riyapti.» — Bir do'st kasal bo'lib qolgan ikkinchisiga maslahat beradi. Suhbat o'zini his qilishni aytish, dorixonaga borishni taklif qilish va qaysi dori olishni so'rashni o'rgatadi. Shamollash, dori va davolanishga oid foydali so'zlar bor. Tinglash va soyalab takrorlash uchun ideal.
description_ru: «Я простудился, болит голова и горло тоже болит.» — Один друг даёт совет другому, который заболел. Диалог учит описывать самочувствие, предлагать сходить в аптеку и спрашивать, какое лекарство взять. Полезная лексика про простуду, лекарства и лечение. Идеален для аудирования и шэдоуинга.
description_en: «I caught a cold — my head hurts and my throat hurts too.» — One friend gives advice to another who has fallen ill. The chat practises describing symptoms, suggesting a trip to the pharmacy, and asking which medicine to buy. It carries useful words for colds, medicine, and recovery. Ideal for listening and shadowing.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ liǎnsè bú tài hǎo, zěnme le?
sentences.text_translation: Rangging unchalik yaxshi emas, nima bo'ldi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: У тебя неважный вид, что случилось?
sentences.text_translation_en: You don't look so good — what's wrong?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我感冒了，头疼，嗓子也疼。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ gǎnmào le, tóuténg, sǎngzi yě téng.
sentences.text_translation: Shamollab qoldim, boshim og'riyapti, tomog'im ham og'riyapti.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я простудился, болит голова и горло тоже болит.
sentences.text_translation_en: I caught a cold — my head hurts and my throat hurts too.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 吃了一点感冒药，但是好像没什么用。
sentences.pinyin: Chī le yì diǎn gǎnmào yào, dànshì hǎoxiàng méi shénme yòng.
sentences.text_translation: Bir oz shamollashga qarshi dori ichdim, lekin foydasi yo'qqa o'xshaydi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Выпил немного лекарства от простуды, но, похоже, толку нет.
sentences.text_translation_en: I took some cold medicine, but it doesn't seem to help.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那你最好去医院看看，让医生开点药。
sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ zuì hǎo qù yīyuàn kàn kan, ràng yīshēng kāi diǎn yào.
sentences.text_translation: Unda shifoxonaga borib ko'rganing ma'qul, shifokor dori yozib bersin.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда лучше сходи в больницу, пусть врач выпишет лекарства.
sentences.text_translation_en: Then you'd better go to the hospital and have a doctor prescribe some medicine.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我不想去医院，人太多了，要排很久。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ bù xiǎng qù yīyuàn, rén tài duō le, yào pái hěn jiǔ.
sentences.text_translation: Shifoxonaga borgim kelmayapti, odam juda ko'p, uzoq navbatda turish kerak.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не хочу в больницу, там слишком много людей, придётся долго стоять в очереди.
sentences.text_translation_en: I don't want to go to the hospital — it's too crowded, you have to wait a long time.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那去药店买点药也行。药店就在小区门口。
sentences.pinyin: Nà qù yàodiàn mǎi diǎn yào yě xíng. Yàodiàn jiù zài xiǎoqū ménkǒu.
sentences.text_translation: Unda dorixonadan dori olsang ham bo'ladi. Dorixona turar joy darvozasi oldida.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда можно купить лекарства в аптеке. Аптека прямо у входа в наш район.
sentences.text_translation_en: Then buying some medicine at the pharmacy works too. The pharmacy is right at the neighborhood entrance.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 好，我一会儿去买。你觉得我应该买什么药？
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo, wǒ yíhuìr qù mǎi. Nǐ juéde wǒ yīnggāi mǎi shénme yào?
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi, birozdan keyin borib olaman. Seningcha qanday dori olishim kerak?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Хорошо, скоро схожу куплю. Как думаешь, какое лекарство мне взять?
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, I'll go buy some soon. What medicine do you think I should get?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你可以买感冒冲剂和止咳糖浆，效果不错。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ mǎi gǎnmào chōngjì hé zhǐké tángjiāng, xiàoguǒ búcuò.
sentences.text_translation: Shamollashga qarshi kukun va yo'talga qarshi sirop olsang bo'ladi, natijasi yaxshi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Можешь купить порошок от простуды и сироп от кашля, они хорошо помогают.
sentences.text_translation_en: You can buy cold granules and cough syrup — they work well.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Bú guì, jǐ shí kuài qián jiù gòu le.
sentences.text_translation: Qimmat emas, bir necha o'n yuan yetadi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Недорогие, несколько десятков юаней — и хватит.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not expensive — a few dozen yuan is enough.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Hǎo, wǒ qù mǎi. Xièxie nǐ!
sentences.text_translation_en: Okay, I'll go buy them. Thank you!
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 不客气！记得多喝水，多休息。
sentences.pinyin: Bú kèqi! Jìde duō hē shuǐ, duō xiūxi.
sentences.text_translation: Arzimaydi! Ko'proq suv ichishni va ko'proq dam olishni unutma.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не за что! Не забывай побольше пить воды и больше отдыхать.
sentences.text_translation_en: You're welcome! Remember to drink lots of water and get plenty of rest.
sentences.speaker: A
